name: grok
description: Use Grok as a coding assistant from Codex / ChatGPT: review, reason, implement, and verify through a hardened sandboxed wrapper. Not affiliated with xAI.

interface.shortDescription: Hardened Grok companion for review, reason, code, verify
interface.longDescription: Ship-ready Grok CLI integration for Codex CLI and the ChatGPT desktop app (Codex). Every mode runs in a private auth home under a verified OS sandbox, emits exactly one machine-readable JSON result envelope, and keeps write-capable work in isolated git worktrees. The Python engine is bundled inside the plugin install tree so marketplace cache installs work without env hacks. Not affiliated with xAI.
defaultPrompt: Run the grok preflight skill and summarize readiness.
Use the grok review skill on the current change set and report correctness bugs.
Use the grok reason skill to critique this architecture decision.
